name: Honey Newtons
recipeInstructions:
For the cookie dough: Cream butter and add cheese (at room temperature). Stir in sifted all-purpose flour; mix well, and chill.
To prepare filling, combine remaining ingredients and simmer gently, stirring. Cook until consistency of marmalade, approximately 15 minutes. Set aside to cool.
Roll dough 1/8 inch thick on lightly floured board. Cut into 2-inch circles. Place half of the circles about 1 inch apart on a lightly greased baking sheet. Place 1 teaspoon filling in the center of each cookie. Top each with another circle of dough. Press edges with fork to seal. Prick cookie tops in several places. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove to racks to cool.
